prestazioni: JDM-spec KF-DET (659cc turbocharged inline-4) forced induction upgrade with a Garrett GT1549S turbocharger (550cc injector upgrade, HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve, and Tomei 4-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold with 38mm primary tubes)

Full standalone Haltech Elite 1500 ECU with custom 3D-printed intake manifold (polycarbonate, 30% lighter than OEM) and ID1000 fuel injectors, paired with a custom-mapped ignition system using Denso Iridium IKH22 spark plugs and HKS Hi-Power ignition coils

KYB AGX adjustable coilovers (front: 30-way damping, rear: 24-way damping) with Cusco 22mm front sway bar, Whiteline adjustable rear toe arms, and SuperPro poly bushings (front control arms, subframe, and differential mounts) for chassis rigidity
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 aero kit (carbon fiber front bumper, side skirts, and ducktail spoiler) with custom 3M Gloss Black wrap and JDM-spec Copen Robe grille (LED DRL conversion)
Work Emotion CR Kiwami 15x7 +38 wheels (185/50R15 Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires) with custom 5x100 to 4x100 hubcentric spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) and Muteki SR45 lug nuts

Recaro SRD-II bucket seats (JDM-spec, red Alcantara with black leather bolsters) paired with Sabelt 4-point harnesses and a custom bolt-in roll cage (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, 6-point design with gusseted rear triangulation)
